response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The lyrics reference JSON was mostly empty, so manual transcription was used for both songs ('36℃' and 'clumsy trick') and the MC talk segments. 2. JSON Usage: The structured boundaries of the scenes were respected. Manual transcription of the Japanese vocals was executed to ensure high accuracy. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were synchronized precisely with vocal starts and aggressively truncated to match the rapid flow of the dialogue and lyrics, avoiding cascading delays.

subtitles.original: ３６度とウブな 君にのぼせちゃう
subtitles.english: I'm getting dizzy over 36 degrees and your innocence.

subtitles.original: もうちょい私にお熱をあげてほしいのです
subtitles.english: I want you to give me a little more of your heat.

subtitles.original: 余裕に見えて 私もいっぱいいっぱいで本地
subtitles.english: Though I look relaxed, I'm actually overwhelmed.

subtitles.original: はい勝負！本音を打ち明けちゃう
subtitles.english: It's a showdown! I'll reveal my true feelings.

subtitles.original: 完璧な おねだりだって
subtitles.english: Even with perfect begging,

subtitles.original: ちょっとくらいの隙がなくちゃ
subtitles.english: there needs to be at least a little opening.

subtitles.original: 好きになんて なれるはずがないものでしょ
subtitles.english: Otherwise, there's no way you can fall for me, right?

subtitles.original: だから君を 待ち伏せています
subtitles.english: That's why I'm waiting in ambush for you.

subtitles.original: いつだって
subtitles.english: Anytime,

subtitles.original: ちょっと
subtitles.english: just a little...

subtitles.original: 甘い誘惑に連れ去られてみたい
subtitles.english: I want to be carried away by sweet temptation.

subtitles.original: #ラブさま大解放2026
subtitles.english: [On-Screen: #LoveSamaGrandRelease2026]

subtitles.original: 「36℃ U・B・U」でしたー！
subtitles.english: That was '36℃ UBU'!

subtitles.original: どうだったかなー？
subtitles.english: How was it?

subtitles.original: 最高でしたー！
subtitles.english: It was awesome!

subtitles.original: ラプくんありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you, Lapu-kun!

subtitles.original: 一緒にパフォーマンスしてくれて嬉しいよ！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy you performed with me!

subtitles.original: は、あの、光栄で楽しかったです。
subtitles.english: Y-Yes, um, it was an honor and so much fun.

subtitles.original: あの、間近でそらちゃんのパフォーマンス見れて、もう光栄でした！
subtitles.english: Getting to see Sora-chan's performance up close was such an honor!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: えっと、今日は次の曲が最後になるんだけど...
subtitles.english: Um, the next song will be the last one today, but...

subtitles.original: えー！早すぎます！
subtitles.english: Eh?! That's too fast!

subtitles.original: まだ見たいです！
subtitles.english: I still want to watch!

subtitles.original: うふふ、名残惜しいけど...
subtitles.english: Ehehe, I'll miss it too, but...

subtitles.original: 次の曲はみんなにも声を出してほしいな！
subtitles.english: For the next song, I want everyone to raise their voices!

subtitles.original: 一緒に最後まで楽しもうね！ラプくんも。
subtitles.english: Let's have fun together until the end! You too, Lapu-kun.

subtitles.original: も、もちろんですよ！もう声枯れるまでやります！
subtitles.english: O-Of course! I'll do it until my voice goes hoarse!

subtitles.original: ラプくん、喉は大事にしてね。
subtitles.english: Lapu-kun, take care of your throat.

subtitles.original: はい！あ、そらお姉ちゃん、
subtitles.english: Yes! Ah, Sora-oneechan,

subtitles.original: あの、我輩の先輩もどうしてもライブ見たいって言ってるんですけど...
subtitles.english: um, my senior also really wants to watch the live...

subtitles.original: 呼んでいいですか？
subtitles.english: can I invite her over?

subtitles.original: えっ、だれだれ？
subtitles.english: Eh, who is it?

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ！
subtitles.english: Please do!

subtitles.original: すみません、あ、お呼び出ししましょう。
subtitles.english: Excuse me, ah, let's call her over.

subtitles.original: おーい！
subtitles.english: Heyyy!

subtitles.original: よ、よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: P-Please treat me well!

subtitles.original: そら先輩、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Sora-senpai, thank you so much!

subtitles.original: わー、みこさん！
subtitles.english: Wow, Miko-san!

subtitles.original: お会いできて光栄です！
subtitles.english: It's an honor to meet you!

subtitles.original: こ、こちらこそです！
subtitles.english: L-Likewise!

subtitles.original: パフォーマンス楽しみにしてます！
subtitles.english: We're looking forward to your performance!

subtitles.original: うん！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: お姉ちゃん頑張っちゃうよ！
subtitles.english: Onee-chan is gonna do her best!

subtitles.original: か、可愛すぎる...
subtitles.english: S-She's too cute...

subtitles.original: それでは、次の曲聞いてください。
subtitles.english: Now, please listen to the next song.

subtitles.original: 退屈中 熱くなり お茶いかが？
subtitles.english: Getting hot during boredom, how about some tea?

subtitles.original: 冷静に 大人びた？
subtitles.english: Calmly, did I grow up?

subtitles.original: ハートは君も欲しい？
subtitles.english: Do you want my heart too?

subtitles.original: ご相談 チラチラと
subtitles.english: A little consultation, peeking at me.

subtitles.original: 余裕身につけて
subtitles.english: Acquiring some composure,

subtitles.original: 憂鬱 お相手は優等 絡まぬよう
subtitles.english: melancholy. Your opponent is a model student, so as not to get entangled.

subtitles.original: しないで 優雅 噛み付くほど欲しい
subtitles.english: Please don't, gracefully, so much that I want to bite.

subtitles.original: レディ レディ 甘えた方を見せてほしい
subtitles.english: Lady, Lady, I want you to show me your spoiled side.

subtitles.original: 一緒に歌ってくれる？
subtitles.english: Will you sing with me?

subtitles.original: はみだしたい もっと 変われないの
subtitles.english: I want to stand out more, can't I change?

subtitles.original: 自由型のアプローチは好き放題保存
subtitles.english: Freestyle approach, as much as I like,

subtitles.original: その塩梅 もっと
subtitles.english: that balance, more...

subtitles.original: 戻れないの
subtitles.english: Can't go back,

subtitles.original: 優しいフリしてただ焦らせる
subtitles.english: pretending to be gentle, just teasing me.

subtitles.original: 二人とも、よくできました！
subtitles.english: You two did a great job!

subtitles.original: そっと効果をあげて 君を 魅せて君を
subtitles.english: Softly increasing the effect, showing you off, showing you off.

subtitles.original: そっと心をタップ 君を ああ君を
subtitles.english: Softly tapping the heart, you, oh you.

subtitles.original: 知りたい ラストもお願い！
subtitles.english: I want to know, one last time please!

subtitles.original: はみだしたい もっと 変われないの
subtitles.english: I want to stand out more, can't I change?

subtitles.original: 自由型のアプローチは好き放題
subtitles.english: Freestyle approach, as much as I like,

subtitles.original: その塩梅
subtitles.english: that balance,

subtitles.original: もう 戻れないの　優しい
subtitles.english: I can't go back anymore,

subtitles.original: 優しいフリして ただ焦らせて もっと
subtitles.english: pretending to be gentle, just teasing me more.

subtitles.original: 抜けないの
subtitles.english: Can't escape it,

subtitles.original: 乱したウインク 戻したいけど
subtitles.english: that messy wink, I want to undo it but...

subtitles.original: そのポーカーもう 越えられないの
subtitles.english: That poker face, I can't cross it anymore.

subtitles.original: そもそもな話 まだ隠して
subtitles.english: Essentially speaking, still hiding it,

subtitles.original: 見つめている
subtitles.english: watching you.
